title: Something for the Boys
writer: Robert Ellis, Helen Logan, Frank Gabrielson
actors: Carmen Miranda, Michael O'Shea, Vivian Blaine
plot: The oddly-assorted Hart cousins--revue singer Blossom, con man Harry and machinist Chiquita (who gets radio through her teeth!)--inherit Southern plantation Magnolia Manor, which alas proves to be a "termite trap" and tax liabilit...
